title: Giant Red Mushroom
description: Adds a giant Red Mushroom to the Dark Forest and Mushroom Fields biome.
body:
### Giant Red Mushroom

**This simple mod adds a giant Red Mushroom to the Dark Forest and Mushroom Fields biome.**
![mushroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92508cbf048b352d5ecc37c87acdc285aacd3683.jpeg)



- The terrain around the Mushroom is designed to blend naturally with the biome.
- Perfect spot to build a base, the structure has a big inner area with Mooshrooms living inside.
  
This mod is also part of the combined ''Giant Natural Additions'' mod.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
